description_long: This is a green baseball cap with a structured, six-panel design and prominent yellow stitching along the seams and brim. The front features a circular black patch with a red star-like emblem at its center, adding a bold decorative accent. The brim is flat and wide, typical of modern streetwear styles, and the back includes an adjustable snap closure for size customization. The crown is rounded and slightly domed, providing a comfortable fit for the wearer. The cap appears to be made primarily of fabric, likely cotton or polyester, with plastic components for the snap closure and patch. This hat is suitable for casual urban wear and offers both style and sun protection.
description: A green, six-panel baseball cap with yellow stitching, a flat brim, and a black patch featuring a red star emblem on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black patch with a red star emblem centered on the structured green crown and the flat brim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth green panels, yellow stitching, and the edge of the front patch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the adjustable snap closure and the clean, uninterrupted green panels with yellow stitching.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile of the cap and the edge of the front patch.
attribute_brand_or_logo: red star emblem on black patch
